nasb.text: Behold, the siege ramps have reached the city to take it; and the city is given into the hand of the Chaldeans who fight against it, because of the sword, the famine and the pestilence; and what You have spoken has come to pass; and behold, You see it.

esv.text: Behold, the siege mounds have come up to the city to take it, and because of sword and famine and pestilence the city is given into the hands of the Chaldeans who are fighting against it. What you spoke has come to pass, and behold, you see it.

cnv.text: 看哪！敵人已經迫近，築壘攻取這城。這城要因刀劍、饑荒和瘟疫的緣故，交在攻擊他們的迦勒底人手中；你所說的都實現了，你也親眼看見了。

ccb.text: 看啊，敌人已经修筑高台要攻打这城，这城要因战争、饥荒和瘟疫而落入迦勒底人手中。你所说的都应验了，你也看见了。
